---
title: Replication gallery
---

Published cost-effectiveness tutorials reproduced with `heormodel`, one per model type. Each replicates a peer-reviewed decision model with public code, matching its deterministic results, then flows the same model through `heormodel.cea` and `heormodel.voi`. All three use the Sick-Sicker example, so they share a structure and differ only in the engine and the time dependence.

| Replication | Engine | Deterministic result |
|---|---|---|
| [Cohort state-transition model](mdm-cohort.qmd) | `MarkovModel` | Matches the published ICERs exactly |
| [Time-dependent cohort model](mdm-cohort-timedep.qmd) | `MarkovModel`, per-cycle transitions | Matches the published ICERs exactly |
| [Microsimulation](mdm-microsim.qmd) | `MicrosimModel`, `duration_groups` | Matches within Monte Carlo error |

## What each one shows

The [cohort tutorial](mdm-cohort.qmd) builds the time-independent Sick-Sicker model: one transition matrix per strategy, Simpson's 1/3 within-cycle correction, and a probabilistic sensitivity analysis on the tutorial's own distributions.

The [time-dependent tutorial](mdm-cohort-timedep.qmd) adds age-varying mortality from a life table (a per-cycle transition array) and transition rewards for the cost of dying and the disutility of onset.

The [microsimulation tutorial](mdm-microsim.qmd) needs an individual-level model: mortality rises with time spent in the sick states, and a per-person effect modifier scales the treatment utility. The `duration_groups` counter carries duration across the Sick to Sicker progression.

## Sources

- Alarid-Escudero F, Krijkamp EM, Enns EA, Yang A, Hunink MGM, Pechlivanoglou P, Jalal H. An introductory tutorial on cohort state-transition models in R using a cost-effectiveness analysis example. Medical Decision Making. 2023;43(1):3-20.
- Alarid-Escudero F, Krijkamp EM, Enns EA, Yang A, Hunink MGM, Pechlivanoglou P, Jalal H. A tutorial on time-dependent cohort state-transition models in R using a cost-effectiveness analysis example. Medical Decision Making. 2023;43(1):21-41.
- Krijkamp EM, Alarid-Escudero F, Enns EA, Jalal HJ, Hunink MGM, Pechlivanoglou P. Microsimulation modeling for health decision sciences using R: a tutorial. Medical Decision Making. 2018;38(3):400-422.
